title: CW8 4GX, Winnington CHP Limited: environmental permit issued – EPR/EP3337NY/V006
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: Winnington CHP Limited   Installation name: Winnington Sodium Carbonate Manufacturing Site   Permit number: EPR/EP3337NY/V006   "
